calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Determining Property To Be Titled In Name Of Trust (Probate Code 17200 Et Seq & 8
Off Calendar Mar-04-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Emily Foehr, apearing via Zoom, for Petitioner Andrea Witherill.

Court questions counsel regarding the status of the filing of an additional declaration from the drafting attorney. Counsel confirms that it has been filed. Court also questions counsel regarding whether the Green Street property will be added to the Trust. Counsel confirms that it will.

The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: S. Le/R. Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition For Order Determining Property To Be Titled In Name Of Trust (Probate Code 17200 Et Seq & 8
Off Calendar Jan-20-2021 Continued To Mar-03-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Emily Foehr appeared by zoom for Andrea Witherill (Petitioner).

The Court stated that it reviewed the petition and the supplement, that it is comfortable with venue being in San Francisco and that it is having a struggle with putting assets in the trust when the assets were not in existence at the time when the trust was executed. Ms. Foehr stated that the trust did not have a schedule of assets, that the list could be called a list of general assets at the time of the decedent's death, that the will is a pour-over will to the trust, that it is a showing of the Decedent's intent to have everything go into the trust and that her Client confirmed that it is the Decedent's hand writing. The Court stated that it does not think it has enough here to confirm the assets as trust assets, and that it is struggling with the hand-written note. Ms. Foehr asked if the Court would be willing to confirm the real property as a trust asset, that the real property is on the list and that it is the biggest asset. The Court stated that it could not tell what the drafting Attorney intended with exhibit C. The Petition for Order Determining Property to be Titled in Name of Trust is continued to March 3, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to provide a further declaration from the drafting Attorney.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition For Order Determining Property To Be Titled In Name Of Trust (Probate Code 17200 Et Seq & 850 Et Seq.)
Off Calendar Dec-07-2020 Continued To Jan-20-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
